titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Stewart Airport development studies, 1973-1975.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by H. Finch

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Martin Heggestad May 2003

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Stewart Airport Development Studies,1973-1975
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: ©2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: "A Study for the Development of Stewart Airport," January 1973, 6 volumes, prepared by TransPlan Incorporated and Seelye Stevenson Value & Knecht, Inc. for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority; "Stewart Airport Environmental Impact Assessment Report," 2 volumes, prepared by Landrum & Brown, Airport Consultants for the Federal Aviation Administration.

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Stewart Airport, in Newburgh, Orange County, N.Y., developed from Stewart Air Force Base to a large civil airport owned and operated by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: "A Study for the Development of Stewart Airport," January 1973, 6 volumes, prepared by TransPlan Incorporated and Seelye Stevenson Value & Knecht, Inc. for the Metropolitan Transportation Authority; "Stewart Airport Environmental Impact Assessment Report," 2 volumes, prepared by Landrum & Brown, Airport Consultants for the Federal Aviation Administration.

did.unittitle: Stewart Airport , A Study for the Development of .... [Newburgh, Orange County, New York] Jan. 1973. 6 vols.
Stewart Airport Environmental Impact Assessment Report. 2 vols.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Stewart Airport development studies, #4432. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
